item.title: SAX discretization parameters optimization
item.description: An example of finding optimal discretization parameters for motif and discord discovery using GrammarViz 3.0 GUI.

item.title: Time series anomaly detection using GUI
item.description: Discover anomalous time series patterns using GrammarViz 3.0 Graphical User Interface

item.title: Time series anomaly detection using CLI
item.description: Discover anomalous time series patterns using GrammarViz 3.0 command line interface

item.title: Time series recurrent pattern (motif) discovery using CLI
item.description: Discover recurrent time series patterns using GrammarViz 3.0 command line interface

item.title: Time series recurrent pattern (motif) discovery using GUI
item.description: Discover recurrent time series patterns using GrammarViz 3.0 Graphical User Interface

item.title: SAX discretization parameters optimization
item.description: Discusses SAX discretization parameters optimization approach implemented in GrammarViz 3.0.

item.title: Temporal anomaly discovery
item.description: Discusses previous work on time series anomaly discovery.
